mainEntity.name: Can I get workers comp for a hernia if I got it from lifting at my job?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes, hernias caused by workplace lifting are covered. However, you must report the specific incident and seek medical care quickly, as insurance companies often claim hernias are pre-existing or non-work-related if there is a delay in reporting.
